contents: * Register all Shaka API Docs Stimulus controllers.
* CodeTabs — switches language tabs in a code block.
// Activate first tab if none selected yet
* CopyCode — copies visible code panel content to clipboard.
* The controller looks for code inside the nearest code block ancestor.
* Falls back to a CSS selector via data-shaka-copy-code-target-value.
// 1. Look in nearest ancestor code block
* Add data-open on the article to expand by default.
this.#setState(openByDefault, false); // no animation on connect
// Small trick to trigger reflow for animation
* Sidebar — mobile open/close + active link detection.
*   <!-- In topbar (different scope — direct DOM call) -->
// Expose instance for external access (topbar burger)
// Exact match or exact page match (not just startsWith to avoid false positives)
// Remove from all hash links, then set
* TOC — auto-builds table of contents + scroll-spy.
.shaka-alert--info    { background: var(--s-subtle);    border-color: var(--border);       color: var(--t-secondary); }
.shaka-alert--success { background: var(--brand-subtle); border-color: var(--brand-muted); color: var(--brand); }
.shaka-badge--brand   { background: var(--brand-soft);   color: var(--brand);        border: 1px solid var(--brand-muted); }
.shaka-badge--accent  { background: var(--accent-soft);  color: var(--accent-hover); border: 1px solid var(--accent-muted); }
.shaka-badge--danger  { background: var(--danger-soft);  color: var(--danger);       border: 1px solid var(--danger-muted); }
.shaka-badge--neutral { background: var(--s-soft);       color: var(--t-secondary);  border: 1px solid var(--border); }
.shaka-badge--night   { background: var(--night-raised); color: var(--night-subtle); border: 1px solid var(--night-border); }
background: var(--brand-soft); color: var(--brand); border: 1px solid var(--brand-muted);
transition: color var(--ease), background var(--ease), border-color var(--ease);
transition: color var(--ease), background var(--ease), border-color var(--ease);
.shaka-code-tabs__tab.is-active { color: var(--code-keyword); background: rgba(121,192,255,.1); border-color: rgba(121,192,255,.2); }
.shaka-api-endpoint-card { padding: 1rem 1.25rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--r-2xl); background: var(--s-page); }
.shaka-api-endpoint-card__meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: .5rem; }

.shaka-api-endpoint-card__path { font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: .82rem; color: var(--t-secondary); padding: .2rem .5rem; background: var(--s-subtle); border-radius: var(--r-md); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
.shaka-api-endpoint-card__responses { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .35rem; padding: 0; margin: .75rem 0 0; }

.shaka-api-endpoint-card__responses li { display: inline-flex; gap: .3rem; padding: .2rem .55rem; border-radius: var(--r-full); font-size: .78rem; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; background: var(--s-soft); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
transition: border-color var(--ease), box-shadow var(--ease), transform var(--ease-enter);

.shaka-api-feature-card { padding: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--r-2xl); background: var(--s-page); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .625rem; transition: border-color var(--ease), box-shadow var(--ease); }
.shaka-method--get    { color: var(--method-get);    background: var(--method-get-bg);    border-color: var(--method-get-border); }
.shaka-method--post   { color: var(--method-post);   background: var(--method-post-bg);   border-color: var(--method-post-border); }
.shaka-method--put    { color: var(--method-put);    background: var(--method-put-bg);    border-color: var(--method-put-border); }
.shaka-method--patch  { color: var(--method-patch);  background: var(--method-patch-bg);  border-color: var(--method-patch-border); }
.shaka-method--delete { color: var(--method-delete); background: var(--method-delete-bg); border-color: var(--method-delete-border); }

.shaka-api-method         { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 3.75rem; padding: .2rem .5rem; border-radius: var(--r-sm); font-size: .6875rem; font-weight: 800; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; text-transform: uppercase; flex-shrink: 0; border: 1px solid transparent; }
.shaka-api-method--get    { color: var(--method-get);    background: var(--method-get-bg);    border-color: var(--method-get-border); }
.shaka-api-method--post   { color: var(--method-post);   background: var(--method-post-bg);   border-color: var(--method-post-border); }
.shaka-api-method--put    { color: var(--method-put);    background: var(--method-put-bg);    border-color: var(--method-put-border); }
.shaka-api-method--patch  { color: var(--method-patch);  background: var(--method-patch-bg);  border-color: var(--method-patch-border); }
.shaka-api-method--delete { color: var(--method-delete); background: var(--method-delete-bg); border-color: var(--method-delete-border); }
.shaka-api-response-table { overflow-x: auto; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--r-xl); background: var(--s-page); box-shadow: var(--shadow-xs); }
.shaka-api-response-table td { padding: .75rem 1rem; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft); font-size: .84rem; }
.shaka-api-response-table th { font-size: .7rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--t-muted); background: var(--s-subtle); }
transition: color var(--ease), border-color var(--ease), background var(--ease);
img, picture, video, canvas, svg { display: block; max-width: 100%; }
input, button, textarea, select { font: inherit; }
button { cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none; }
SHAKA API DOCS — Design Tokens v2
Palette Removit × Vercel : vert / jaune / rouge / bleu nuit
font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', ui-monospace, monospace;
font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', ui-monospace, monospace;
overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0,0,0,0); white-space: nowrap;
type   string  info | success | warning | danger
text   string  Body text (or use block alert_content)
{% if title is defined and title %}
{% if text is defined and text %}

<svg class="shaka-code-block__copy-icon" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" aria-hidden="true">
method       string  GET | POST | PUT | PATCH | DELETE
responses    array   [{ code: int, label: string }]
params       array   [{ name, type, required, description }]
{% if params is defined and params is not empty %}
{% if icon is defined and icon %}
rows     array   [{ field, type, required?, description }]
{ field: 'id',         type: 'string',   required: true,  description: 'Unique identifier (UUID v4).' },
{ field: 'name',       type: 'string',   required: true,  description: 'Human-readable display name.' },
{ field: 'created_at', type: 'datetime', required: false, description: 'ISO 8601 creation timestamp.' }
{% set has_required = rows|filter(r => r.required is defined)|length > 0 %}
<table class="shaka-table" {% if caption is defined %}aria-label="{{ caption }}"{% endif %}>
api_acronym      string  2-letter acronym for the mark
{# Inter font via Google Fonts (optional — replace with self-hosted for performance) #}
{% block title %}{{ api_name ?? 'API' }} — Error codes{% endblock %}
All errors return a consistent JSON envelope. Use the error.code field to handle specific cases programmatically.
Every error response wraps the failure in an error object at the top level:
{ field: 'error.code',    type: 'string', required: true,  description: 'Machine-readable error code, e.g. validation_failed.' },
{ field: 'error.message', type: 'string', required: true,  description: 'Human-readable description of the error.' },
{ field: 'error.details', type: 'array',  required: false, description: 'Field-level validation errors (422 only).' },
{ field: 'request_id',    type: 'string', required: true,  description: 'Trace ID — always include this in support requests.' }
The error.code field is a stable, versioned string you can match in your code:
{ field: 'bad_request',        type: '400', description: 'Malformed JSON body or missing Content-Type header.' },
{ field: 'unauthorized',       type: '401', description: 'Missing or expired bearer token.' },
{ field: 'forbidden',          type: '403', description: 'Token is valid but lacks the required permission.' },
{ field: 'not_found',          type: '404', description: 'The requested resource does not exist or was deleted.' },
{ field: 'validation_failed',  type: '422', description: 'One or more request body fields failed validation.' },
{ field: 'rate_limited',       type: '429', description: 'Too many requests — see Retry-After header.' },
{ field: 'internal_error',     type: '500', description: 'Unexpected server error. Use request_id when reporting.' },
{ field: 'service_unavailable',type: '503', description: 'The service is temporarily offline. Retry after a delay.' }
description: 'Returned when required fields are missing or fail schema validation.',
{ code: 204, label: 'No Content',          desc: 'Success with no response body (e.g. DELETE).' },
{ code: 400, label: 'Bad Request',         desc: 'Malformed JSON or missing Content-Type.' },
{ code: 401, label: 'Unauthorized',        desc: 'Missing or invalid bearer token.' },
{ code: 403, label: 'Forbidden',           desc: 'Valid token but insufficient permissions.' },
{ code: 404, label: 'Not Found',           desc: 'Resource does not exist or was deleted.' },
{ code: 422, label: 'Unprocessable',       desc: 'Request body failed schema validation.' },
{ code: 429, label: 'Too Many Requests',   desc: 'Rate limit exceeded — check Retry-After.' },
{ code: 500, label: 'Internal Error',      desc: 'Unexpected server error — include request_id.' },
{ code: 503, label: 'Service Unavailable', desc: 'Scheduled maintenance or overload.' }
text:  'Use exponential backoff when you receive a 429. Always check the Retry-After header for the exact wait time.'
text:  'Errors 400, 401, 403, 404 and 422 indicate a problem with your request. Fix it before retrying.'
text:  'The request_id is logged on every request. It allows our team to trace the exact cause of a 5xx error.'
{{ api_subtitle ?? 'Clean, professional API docs inspired by Stripe, Vercel and Linear — built for Symfony.' }}
text:  'Twig, CSS and Stimulus controllers ship in one Composer package — zero config required.'
text:  'Install with Composer, configure with Flex, preview the demo in seconds.'
text:  'Override any CSS token or Twig block. No rebuild, no framework lock-in.'
Every request must include a valid bearer token in the Authorization header.
text:  'Never expose API keys in client-side code, git repos or public logs.'
A quick overview of the most frequently used endpoints.
description: 'Returns a paginated list of all users, ordered by creation date.',
description: 'Creates a new user from the JSON payload. Returns the created resource.',
description: 'Permanently deletes a user. This action cannot be undone.',
All responses return JSON with a consistent envelope structure:
{ field: 'data',       type: 'object | array', required: false, description: 'The response payload. Null on error.' },
{ field: 'meta',       type: 'object',         required: false, description: 'Pagination cursors and total counts.' },
{ field: 'error',      type: 'object',         required: false, description: 'Error object — present only on failure.' },
{ field: 'request_id', type: 'string',         required: true,  description: 'Unique trace ID. Include in support requests.' }
text: 'Use the request_id field to correlate log entries and contact support.'
The API enforces per-token rate limits. When a limit is exceeded, the server responds with 429 Too Many Requests.
{ field: 'X-RateLimit-Limit',     type: 'integer', description: 'Maximum requests allowed in the current window.' },
{ field: 'X-RateLimit-Remaining', type: 'integer', description: 'Requests remaining before the limit is hit.' },
{ field: 'Retry-After',            type: 'integer', description: 'Seconds to wait before retrying (429 only).' }
Full reference for all available endpoints. Click any card to expand parameters and response codes.
description: 'Returns a paginated list of all users ordered by creation date.',
{ field: 'page',     type: 'integer', required: false, description: 'Page number, starting at 1.' },
{ field: 'per_page', type: 'integer', required: false, description: 'Results per page (max 100, default 20).' },
{ field: 'q',        type: 'string',  required: false, description: 'Filter by name or email (case-insensitive).' }
description: 'Retrieve a single user by their UUID.',
description: 'Create a new user account from a JSON body.',
{ field: 'name',     type: 'string', required: true,  description: 'Full display name.' },
{ field: 'email',    type: 'string', required: true,  description: 'Unique email address.' },
{ field: 'password', type: 'string', required: true,  description: 'Plain-text password (min 8 chars).' },
{ field: 'role',     type: 'string', required: false, description: 'One of: user, admin. Default: user.' }
description: 'Partially update a user. Only provided fields are changed.',
description: 'Permanently delete a user and all associated data.',
description: 'Returns all projects accessible to the authenticated user.',
description: 'Retrieve a project by its UUID, including owner and tags.',
description: 'Create a new project owned by the authenticated user.',
{ field: 'name',        type: 'string',   required: true,  description: 'Project display name.' },
{ field: 'description', type: 'string',   required: false, description: 'Optional longer description.' },
{ field: 'tags',        type: 'string[]', required: false, description: 'Array of tag strings.' }
{ field: 'id',          type: 'string',   required: true,  description: 'Project UUID, prefixed proj_.' },
{ field: 'name',        type: 'string',   required: true,  description: 'Project display name.' },
{ field: 'status',      type: 'string',   required: true,  description: 'One of: active, archived, draft.' },
{ field: 'owner',       type: 'object',   required: true,  description: 'Embedded owner user — id, name, email.' },
{ field: 'tags',        type: 'string[]', required: false, description: 'Array of tag strings.' },
{ field: 'created_at',  type: 'datetime', required: true,  description: 'ISO 8601 UTC timestamp.' },
{ field: 'updated_at',  type: 'datetime', required: true,  description: 'ISO 8601 UTC timestamp.' }
